content: Hey guys!! So my friend who got me into Morimens asked me to send a message here on their behalf to get some team building help!! If you guys have any team comp suggestions for him- please share!! <:agree:1400771815076528258>

holy bricked account lol

team comp for what, arc 2 story?
Yeah, they've been playing for way longer than me- and they asked me if I could send a message here to help them build some teams.
like dtide teams or a story team or what
Its a Late game/Arc 2 team
That they need
I just asked em
They normally from what I know (and what you can see) do a Liz Comp and theyre rlly good at it!!
from what i can see this liz comp can barely clear anything
Thats sort of why they need help building a new team lol
They need to do late game stuff

anyway your friend has a lot of characters but all are like barely usable because not enough enlightens

one option is gmurphy lemurians in arc 2, this is gmurphy, miryam, tulu, faros/goliath. not ideal because gmurphy is only e2, but it should be able to clear arc 2 normal mode once leveled

another option is your friend pulls 2 copies of mouchette right now, then they play mouchette thais aigis helot

castor and clementine are usable but they dont have the right teammates to make a viable team with. no dps, no vulnerable applier

salvador potentially viable but it will take 6 million years to dps the boss at e0. lotan potentially viable but she's mostly just worse than mouchette

gdoll is unusable at e0, kath is barely usable at e2, daff is unusable at e0, tawil is unusable at e0, lily is unusable at e1, pollux is unusable at e0
E1 Lily is not unusable
you just dont use her for bonk damage
shes still good sustain
My friend says thank you alot for the Advice and team comps!! <:agree:1400771815076528258> <:agree:1400771815076528258> <:agree:1400771815076528258>
no endure
where sustain
you probably need to rouse her
but i wouldnt say shes unusable
and who are we running e1 lily with
liz? rouse lily to protect liz?
mouchette?
yeah probably Liz
nahhhhhhhh
liz castor lily clem
will be so painful to clear with
i did up to blesser with Liz in nm, it wasnt bad at all
and still no vuln
gdoll brick
blesser is almost impossible within the turn limit though <:dead:1356082627509092372>
e1 clem so no damage
e0 castor
When I told them you said their acc was bricked, THEY IMMEDIATELY AGREED LOL
its not bricked at all, just build the standard lemurians and use one proto on Murphy
and maybe E2 Miryam if possible
Yeah theres no such thing as permanently bricked account
i just meant this box in its current state is not clearing anything lol
just needs a little more vertical investment in characters that arent Liz
Liz doesnt even get that much out of extra levels <:dead:1356082627509092372>
she needs someone else to stack str for her
They just rlly like liz idk what to tell ya
if your friend wants to play liz in arc 2 they can proto gdoll so gdoll actually has vulnerable and weakness
then run liz gdoll castor clementine
im not a liz hater but i think its better to invest in her tank
lily can substitute for castor not sure
I used a level 70 Erica with her and now i used Erica for other stuff
i think castor is better here though
Liz is rough in dtide without Ultra Ring
Erica is one of the most slept on units in the game
erica is ok but why lv70 lol
erica tank??
yeah
i used her for Aisha
she scales really with levels because of alert stacking
crazy
plus her con is good
the first time i limit broker her it was an accident, i was just mindlessly clicking red dots <:KEKW:629740073977380882>
ended up being a better investment than some other characters ive given pyramids to
am i gonn have to e3 daffodil? i got her to E1
(i also have the laser lady whose name i forgot) to e1, should i use the protoparadise to get her to e3?
No
Just kep her e1
Winkle?? Don’t get her E3, she’s not a priority
what should i use the proto thingy on then
cuz im building an ultra team for daffodil
Show your roster
? You already have OE Daff
wait
thats oe?
i thought you have to get it to 3 to get the overexalt thingy
you already have 3
For OE
E1, 2, and 3 refer to the first three stars you see on the character
You’re set
alright thx
Wait
No you need 2 more to OE
I didn’t read it right 💀 but yeah only 2 more
Oe is +4
His daff is at +2
Yes I read and corrected myself
oh
understandable

this team does not work, u have no defense and no dps outside of ultra round

daff team normally revolves around poison/counter synergy to make full use of her mirages

if you are relying on daff base damage hits with only winkle and casiah as support you will not get very far

if you are dead set on using protos to make this team work, the best option is getting OE nautila so you have a nuke that scales with counter. nautila is used in other stall/counter comps as well

you probably still need lily or castor or gdoll or clem or wanda to make the team not suck
if i were you i would not bother building daff until 6 months later when you have a full roster
Castor mention <:hehehoohoo:1435852247526281397>
He’s very good at making teams not suck
good at buying time for bad dps like daff <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
I’m still using the Daff / Nautila / Horla / Castor team LOLL
ALSO YES. OE Naut is seconded
I use her over Pandia
pandia also works for this comp specifically but please do not proto pandia
^ yes please dont do that
Waste of proto
i got lily E1 should i just use her instead of winkle then?
i would replace casiah
daff lily winkle horla at least has a chance of stalling and winning with poison
alright then thx, so i should try to OE nautila then right?
casiah has negative synergy with daff because ultra round is where daff is strongest, and casiah's whole thing is taking cards out of ultra space so you never use ultra round
daff team kinda rough for new player to do because you will be investing all your resources into a team that is still bad
only becomes good when everyone is lv70 OE with premium wheels
including the supports
recommend you build like mouchette as main team and keep daff in your pocket for the future
if im going for mouchette what should be the team comp then?
nice thx
is it worth pulling for mouchette card (I forgot the name of the weapon cards I’m new 😭) if I’m planning to main her or should I save that for character pulls now/ in future? i have e4 mouchette
i have analysis of death critical point dusk and dawn as alternatives so I’m not sure if the extra boost is worth
by e4 you mean e3+1
yeah!!
mouchette wheel is okay but its only good on her
and theres other wheels you can use
ty!!!
such as blade of the titan
which you can get +12 fairly easily since its a standard banner wheel
is this comp fine? or should i replace karen with aigis
Replace Karen
alright

The whole point of bringing Casiah is that you no longer have to rely on ultra turn to deal damage <a:CatShake:1383331842224160788> 
That on top of her being able to stack strength for Daffodil
20 strength
Per card
40 per telekinesis
100 whole strength
surely this will make daff good
E3 Daffodil - Casiah - Horla - Lily was my team for the majority of the game <:DollStare:1441863451541508279>
I did not struggle with any content
lily carry

Before pulling Lily, I played her with E3 GDoll
Which got me through the entirety of arc 1
gdoll carry

waow
so which part didnt you clear with e3 daff
The part that I didn't get to in time before switching to Mouchette

Arc 2

Gmurphy comp

Not the best... but sure,  usuable
I just finished getting my Blade of the Titan to +12, is there any other wheel that I should focus via the standard banner?
In case it matters I'm primarily running a Lemurian comp with GMurph, Goliath, Miriam and Tulu, all are using their unique wheels (+3 besides Goliath who is now on +12)
does anyone uses winkle ? im no expert but her kit is bad i guess i cant see me using any of her skills unless im fighting an very specific boss and even so theres maybe better options
She's a exalt refiller
Very useful for certain comps
For example salvador comps, where you use winkle to recharge thais
i dont know its just i already try using her with daffodil but since i dont have e3 only e2 she does not seems viable in any way
Her 3 cost is useless when she's not invested
So sell it
Use her 2 cost as a source of weakness
And aliemus/skey depends
Don't expect her to shield you too much
You should treat her as an exalt bot
If you have problem surviving, you probably need another teammate that can help with that
hey for daffodil what main and substats shoud i focus on equip ?, i was going for crit.damage and aliemus
Crit damage and damage amp
Aliemus as a stat is pretty bad
what cov though
Steppenwolf is a common choice
Then there's the more investment option april praise
ah ok I got it right then
April
ok remove aliemus and put damage amp ok
you can get incalculable factor for miryam
Pull standard characters to +12 for upcoming AA buffs, wheel jail is no more <:breakinto:1400771681508790292>
Are those buff that significant?
Half joking, no one knows yet
At best I'd be using Goliath
Fair enough, Ramona is locked to account level anyhow and Aegis and Lotan are the one's I'm purchasing right now.
I'd probably use Aegis a lot more if Lemurian wasn't carrying my smooth brain to the finish line of Act 2 right now.
Because why think when you can just beat the living daylights out of people with tentacles.
Much appreciated
does morimens even have a pity system?
Yes

Yall please help me, while I love my mouch team- I CANT KEEP DOING THIS. I need some new team comps/suggestions on who to pull/invest in/save for in the future. If yall have any PLEASE let me know. Im desperate.
the problem is u dont have any other dps unit
so anything without mouchete is gonna be substantially worse
if you want a change of pace, you can play dps gramona
gramona thais aigis lily
you posse as often as possible and spam predetermined strike
sooo i decided to get mouch over exalt because i actually love her and her weapon e3
right now im running her with hameln, gdoll, and cauc
is that ok? xd
<#1455822126568308957> copy this if you want best performance
Right now your mouchette doesn't crit and team barely supports her
hameln is better than ramona in that comp
follow the guide of helot feeeesh
but yea
mouchette helot aigis hameln is the way
ok :3
i do have thais
yay
then thais is the way

hello since i have gdoll, miryam and faros at a high lvl i was thinking about geting this xu or is xi character i also have thais just in case by the information we have does she need alot of copies to fit a poison team ?
xu is a decent general support at e0, you can just slap her in a team for big hp boost and exalt
she does want more copies if u plan to use her for poison trigger
id say up to e3 is a good stopping point
we dont really know how she plays yet though
so i advise you wait and see
she might be a character where you pull e0 and then e3 wheel
thanks
also doresian is a hard to build character ?
cuz i notice some character are very selfish and less free when it comes to team options
you can look in main chat, elite425 just posted a pile of doresain clears
doing the hardest content in game
can see the team builds he uses
i think doresain is relatively straightforward to build around though, he doesn't NEED any specific teammates
he can kinda solo carry in the right stage
which is not the case for like daffodil
i saw what horla do ? that make her appear so much on youtube videos and in here ?
horla has auras that give 20%-40% to damage
or healing/shield
or aliemus
its very op
What teams can I build for dtide?

gmurphy miryam tulu goliath (wayward ship)

corposant aurita casiah murphy (encounter in pure white)

kath tinct erica ramona (undying sun)

sorel thais pickman celeste (roaring blood and sand)

mouchette helot aigis faint (from the mist realm)

sanga caecus nautila gdoll (festival of tides) - for waves where you can stall with relic for dps

castor jenkin winkle agrippa (derision of destiny) - another stall comp

hameln lotan ogier +support mouchette (voices in your head)
u have a lot of options to pick and choose from
realistically you wont run every single one of these teams cause you have to match teams to waves
but u can use this as a starting point and then move stuff around
the last 2 characters of each team are basically replaceable (except for gmurphy team)
i just put them where i would put them if i was running like 8 teams
you can do fewer

wheres the rest of your characters

ah, Crit Damage

as for poison lineups, this is what I'm running currently, though "24" and Faros might be a good swap-out for Agrippa and Faint
